screen.auracraft.title: Choose Your Effect
screen.auracraft.subtitle: Pick once. You cannot change it later.
effect.auracraft.haste.desc: Increases attack speed and mining speed.
effect.auracraft.jump_boost.desc: Increases jump height and reduces fall damage while active.
effect.auracraft.resistance.desc: Reduces incoming damage from most sources.
effect.auracraft.fire_resistance.desc: Prevents damage from fire, lava, and related burning.
effect.auracraft.conduit_power.desc: Gives underwater breathing, underwater vision, and faster underwater mining.
message.auracraft.prompt_with_key: AuraCraft: Press %s to pick an effect.
message.auracraft.already_chosen: You already selected an effect. It cannot be changed.
message.auracraft.already_chosen_client: You already selected %s. It cannot be changed.
message.auracraft.effect_upgrade_cap: %s is already at the max duplicate upgrade.
message.auracraft.effect_disabled_in_con: That effect is disabled by server config.
message.auracraft.max_effects_reached: You already have the maximum of %s effects.
message.auracraft.no_tokens: You do not have an effect token to select another effect.
message.auracraft.repick_no_effects: You don't have any selected effects to reset.
message.auracraft.repick_item_used_suffi: You can now pick %s effect(s) again.
message.auracraft.extra_token_used: You gained +1 effect token. Available tokens: %s
message.auracraft.kill_dropped_token_ite: You killed a player. They dropped a +Effect item.
message.auracraft.pvp_no_effect_to_lose: You were killed in PvP. You had no effect to lose.
